title: APOSTROPHE Games Island Building Blocks Base Plates Compatible with All Major Brands - 6 Pack of Beach Plates - 4 Corners & 2 Straight - 25.6 cm x 25.6 cm
features: A Must for Building Blocks Enthusiasts: Take your creativity to a whole new level with the Apostrophe Games island baseplates, perfect to ensure a reliable and perfect flat starting base for your amazing creations!

Sturdy and Reliable: This baseplate is made with premium grade, highly durable materials, offering a sturdy ground for numerous building brick creations. The material is 100% safe and guaranteed to withstand the test of time.
Island Pack: This set includes 6 baseplates, with each plate measuring 25.6 cm x 25.6 cm, with a total of 32 by 32 dots. You’ll receive 4 x corner beach plates and 2 straight beach plates

Versatile Uses: Our baseplates are an excellent choice to create your very own building block tables, whether at home, on the go or in the classroom! Use them to design stunning buildings, cities, roads, beaches, or other displays!

Enhanced Compatibility: The Apostrophe Games building block baseplates are designed to ensure full compatibility with the major brand and other models. Order it for yourself or as a thoughtful gift for kids or building block enthusiasts!
description: Product Description Combine the 3 and 6 pack together to make your own giant island The best base plates for building!
